fontFamilies.fontFamily: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen-Sans, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
fontFamilies.name: System Font

styles.css: .wp-block-post-comments-count{align-items:center;background:rgba(141,51,40,.84);border:1px solid rgba(230,223,208,.24);box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:#f3ead8;display:inline-flex;font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--notebook-mono);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;gap:.38rem;letter-spacing:.06em;line-height:1;padding:.38rem .48rem;text-decoration:none;text-transform:uppercase;width:fit-content}.wp-block-post-comments-count a{color:inherit;display:inline-flex;gap:inherit;text-decoration:none}.wp-block-post-comments-count:hover,.wp-block-post-comments-count:focus-within{background:#a84234;border-color:rgba(230,223,208,.42);color:#fff7e8}.wp-block-comments-title{color:var(--wp--preset--color--rust-red);font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--notebook-mono);font-size:clamp(1.05rem,2vw,1.35rem);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.05em;line-height:1.25;margin:0 0 1.4rem;text-transform:uppercase}.wp-block-comment-template{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0}.wp-block-comment-template>li,.wp-block-comment-template .comment{border-top:1px solid rgba(230,223,208,.14);margin:0;padding:1.2rem 0}.wp-block-comment-template>li:first-child,.wp-block-comment-template .comment:first-child{border-top:0;padding-top:0}.wp-block-avatar img{border:1px solid rgba(230,223,208,.22);border-radius:50%;filter:grayscale(1) contrast(1.08)}.wp-block-comment-author-name,.wp-block-comment-date,.wp-block-comment-edit-link,.wp-block-comment-reply-link{font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--system-font);font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.35}.wp-block-comment-author-name{color:var(--wp--preset--color--old-paper);font-weight:700}.wp-block-comment-date,.wp-block-comment-edit-link{color:var(--wp--preset--color--chalk-grey)}.wp-block-comment-author-name a,.wp-block-comment-date a,.wp-block-comment-edit-link a,.wp-block-comment-reply-link a{color:inherit;text-decoration-color:rgba(212,125,102,.52)}.wp-block-comment-reply-link a{color:#d47d66;font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--notebook-mono);font-size:.74rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase}.wp-block-comment-content{color:#d8cebe;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.62;margin-top:.6rem}.wp-block-comment-content p{margin:0}.wp-block-comments-pagination{border-top:1px solid rgba(230,223,208,.14);color:var(--wp--preset--color--chalk-grey);font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--system-font);font-size:.84rem;margin-top:1.1rem;padding-top:1rem}#commentform textarea,#commentform input:not([type="submit"]):not([type="checkbox"]){background:#151311!important;border:1px solid rgba(230,223,208,.26)!important;border-radius:0!important;color:var(--wp--preset--color--old-paper)!important;box-sizing:border-box;width:100%;max-width:100%;padding:.85rem .95rem}#commentform textarea{min-height:13rem;resize:vertical}#commentform #submit,#commentform input.wp-block-button__link.wp-element-button[type="submit"]{appearance:none!important;background:var(--wp--preset--color--rust-red)!important;border:1px solid rgba(230,223,208,.26)!important;border-radius:0!important;box-shadow:none!important;color:#f3ead8!important;display:inline-flex!important;font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--notebook-mono)!important;font-size:.78rem!important;font-weight:700!important;letter-spacing:.08em!important;line-height:1!important;min-height:0!important;padding:.78rem .9rem!important;text-decoration:none!important;text-transform:uppercase!important}#commentform #submit:hover,#commentform #submit:focus{background:#a84234!important;border-color:rgba(230,223,208,.48)!important;color:#fff7e8!important}
